rationale: Review 2 uniquely identifies that `AffineAlgGroup` itself is under-generalized — its two fields only need `[CommRing k]` but inherit `[Field k]` from the outer variable block (confirmed in the diff at line 31/37); this is the most foundational generality issue. Review 1 only catches the narrower `IsUnipotent` over-constraint and misses the base class problem entirely.
